# Security policy

## Supported versions

GUIpi26 is in **alpha**. Only the latest release receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| 0.1.0a1 | ✅ |
| < 0.1.0a1 | ❌ |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security problems.

Instead, use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/DillanStep/guipi26/security/advisories/new) so we can coordinate a fix before disclosure.

Include:

- A description of the issue and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce (minimal code preferred).
- The version of GUIpi26 and Python you tested with.

We aim to acknowledge reports within 7 days.
